column3: Weakleys Drive at New England Highway (Suburb:Beresfield, Region:Hunter)
column14: Allow extra travel time; Exercise caution
column15: Motorists are advised of changed overnight traffic conditions for work under the New England Highway. Off-ramp and lane closures will be in place while work is carried out in stages with detours in place.
column16: Stage 1: Motorists traveling north toward Thornton will not be able to make a right turn from the Weakleys Drive off-ramp. Motorist will need to turn left onto Weakleys Drive and use the roundabout to continue to travel northbound onto Weakleys Drive.  Stage 2: Motorists traveling west on the New England Highway will not be able to exit at the Weakleys Drive off-ramp. Motorist will need to continue on the New England Highway to the u-turn bay and use the eastbound exit to turn back onto Weakleys Drive.  Stage 3: There will be no right turn for motorists travelling south from Weakley Drive off-ramp. Motorists will need to turn left onto Weakleys Drive and use the roundabout to continue onto Weakleys Drive.
